title: Make crosslink init TUI prettier with ratatui library

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--ratatui-tui
comments.content: Plan: Replace dialoguer-based init walkthrough with a full-screen ratatui TUI wizard, and add crossterm-based styled inline output for progress steps. Approach: (1) Add ratatui dep (crossterm comes as re-export via ratatui::crossterm). (2) Build a ratatui alternate-screen walkthrough app with arrow-key navigation for the 4 config questions — replacing dialoguer::Select. (3) Create an InitUI struct using crossterm styling for the step-by-step progress output (✓/✗/⚠ status indicators, colored headers, progress numbers). (4) Preserve non-TTY fallback (plain println). (5) Remove dialoguer dependency since init.rs is the only consumer.
